description: idealo.co.uk is the UK storefront of idealo, a price-comparison shopping service. It lets users compare product offers from retailers and browse deal listings.
summary: idealo.co.uk itself exposes no developer surfaces; the only public integration docs found for idealo point to a separate idealo-owned API host, `import.idealo.com`, for the Partner Web Service REST API using OAuth 2.0 client credentials.
